response.step_by_step_log: The song was identified by searching for the key lyrics 'hare hare ya' and 'kagayaku nda yo'. The song is 'Hare Hare ya' by Sou. The video features a Hololive concert performance. I searched for 'Hare Hare ya Sou Japanese and English lyrics' to get the bilingual lyrics. The concert performance is a single continuous song performance featuring various VTubers.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance of the song 'Hare Hare ya' by various Hololive VTubers.

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform a live version of 'Hare Hare ya' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Yoru no machi mayoishi kegare no ranpo
Doko kara kita no yo misuborashii ne
Nee uchi ni oide atatamete ageru yo
Ima made yoku ganbatta yo ne
Koko de yasunde mimasen ka

Hare hare ya, hare hare ya, hare hare ya
Kono sora ima ookina kyanpasu ni kaete
Korekara ookina e wo egakou ka
Futari de ima ookina fude sora ni muke nobashi
Katate ni anata ga mayowanu you ni te wo tsunagou
Hare hare ya, hare hare ya
How beautiful, How beautiful
Hare hare ya, hare hare ya
How beautiful, How beautiful
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The night is lost in the town, a tattered stray
Where did you come from? You look miserable
Hey, come to my house, I'll warm you up
You've done your best until now, haven't you?
Why don't you rest here for a while?

Clear and sunny, clear and sunny, clear and sunny
Even the sky today can be changed into a big sunny spot
Shall we draw a big picture from now on?
With both of us, holding big brushes now, extending them to the sky
In one hand, for you so you won't get lost, let's hold hands
Clear and sunny, clear and sunny
How beautiful, How beautiful
Clear and sunny, clear and sunny
How beautiful, How beautiful
